findings: Identity, taxonomy, measurements, habitat, behavior, and listed field marks are verified for Sitta carolinensis.

The plate accurately shows a single compact white-breasted nuthatch with one head, one pointed bill, two legs, two wings (one folded and one largely obscured), and one short tail; plumage, bill, eye, wings, feet, and rusty undertail area agree with the supplied reference photos.
No material text, species, anatomy, or location-detail errors found; no place name, ZIP code, coordinates, map, or local-observation detail appears.
